Task.Name: Phase 0: Project Initiation & Governance
Task.Notes: PMO mobilisation, governance, Infosys onboarding, legal, QG1 approval

Task.Name: 0.1 Project Governance & PMO Setup
Task.Notes: KPMG PMO, steering, RACI, Infosys onboarding

Task.Name: QG0 - Programme Kickoff & Mobilisation
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | Programme officially started; all workstream leads mobilised; Infosys contractually engaged

Task.Name: Establish KPMG PMO & Project Management Office
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | PMO governance tools active; reporting cadence; SharePoint site live

Task.Name: Appoint Project Steering Committee (JCI + Bosch + KPMG)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | Steering committee chartered; meeting calendar confirmed

Task.Name: Define RACI & IT Workstream Structure
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + KPMG PMO Lead | RACI approved; nine workstreams defined: Infrastructure, SAP, Applications, Identity, End-User Workplace, Data Migration, Security/GDPR, TSA Exit/HR/Legal, Programme Control

Task.Name: Onboard Infosys as IT Delivery Partner (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager | Infosys Statement of Work executed; MZ scope confirmed; delivery team onsite

Task.Name: Stakeholder Communication Plan (JCI / Bosch / Infosys / 48 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + KPMG PMO Lead | Comms plan approved; escalation path; change management approach

Task.Name: Initial Risk & Issue Register Baseline
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager | Risk register v1.0 baselined; top 25 risks scored and owned (24 threats, 1 opportunity)

Task.Name: 0.2 Legal & Regulatory Compliance Framework
Task.Notes: GDPR, legal entity separation, competition law

Task.Name: GDPR & Data Privacy Assessment (12,000 Users - 48 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI Legal Counsel | Privacy impact assessment; data residency; cross-border transfer rules

Task.Name: Legal Entity Separation & Carve-out Structure
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI Legal Counsel + Bosch Legal Counsel | NewCo SPA; legal entity readiness; Integration model structures confirmed

Task.Name: Regulatory & Competition Law Review (Multi-jurisdiction)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI Legal Counsel | Multi-jurisdiction clearance tracking; antitrust filings; no blocking conditions

Task.Name: QG1 - Concept Approval
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | Project concept approved; Infosys scope confirmed; proceed to Discovery & Architecture

Task.Name: Phase 1: Discovery & Architecture Design
Task.Notes: App inventory 1800+, MZ architecture, TSA catalogue, data strategy

Task.Name: 1.1 Application Landscape Assessment (1,800+ Applications)
Task.Notes: SAP analysis, non-SAP inventory, dependency mapping, wave planning

Task.Name: SAP System Landscape Analysis (Full SAP Scope)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG SAP Architect + Infosys SAP Lead + JCI SAP Owner | SAP component list; modules in scope; interface inventory; carve-out complexity

Task.Name: Non-SAP Application Inventory & Classification (1,800+ Apps)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + Infosys Application Lead + JCI IT Manager | Full app inventory; ownership; migration classification: Keep/Retire/Replace/Re-host

Task.Name: Application Dependency Mapping & Interface Analysis
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + Infosys Application Lead | Cross-app and SAP dependencies; integration interface inventory; circular deps flagged

Task.Name: Application Migration Wave Planning (Waves 1-3)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Application Lead | Wave 1: ~400 critical apps; Wave 2: ~800 standard; Wave 3: ~600 local/specialist

Task.Name: 1.2 Infrastructure & Network Assessment (48 Sites)
Task.Notes: JCI network, DC/cloud, segregation design, device estate

Task.Name: JCI Network Architecture Review (48 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + Infosys Network Lead + JCI IT Manager | WAN, LAN, SD-WAN, firewall topology per site; bandwidth baseline

Task.Name: Data Centre & Cloud Inventory (JCI Hosted Assets)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | Primary & secondary DC; cloud workloads; contracts; hosting obligations

Task.Name: Network Segregation Design (48 Sites to Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + Infosys Network Lead | Site-by-site network separation design; MZ connectivity model; SD-WAN approach

Task.Name: End-User Device Estate Assessment (12,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | Device inventory by site; OS; age; refresh plan; Intune/SCCM readiness

Task.Name: 1.3 Merger Zone Architecture Design (Infosys-led)
Task.Notes: MZ blueprint, AD design, core services architecture

Task.Name: Merger Zone Infrastructure Blueprint (Infosys)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | MZ DC/cloud topology; compute; storage; network zones; security perimeter

Task.Name: Identity & Active Directory Design (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + Infosys IAM Lead | MZ AD forest design; trust model with JCI and Bosch; federation approach

Task.Name: Core Services Architecture (Email, M365, Collaboration, Security)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + Infosys Cloud Lead | MZ M365 tenant architecture; Teams; security tooling; ITSM platform selection

Task.Name: 1.4 TSA Service Catalogue & Exit Plan
Task.Notes: JCI TSA services catalogued; SLA agreed; exit criteria defined

Task.Name: TSA Service Definition & SLA Agreement per Service Line
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI IT Manager + Bosch IT Manager | All JCI services to continue under TSA catalogued; SLA and KPI per service line

Task.Name: TSA Governance & Transition Reporting Framework
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI IT Manager | Monthly TSA service reports; escalation path; service exit trigger criteria

Task.Name: TSA Exit Criteria per Service Line
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + KPMG PMO Lead | Exit criteria defined per service; acceptance testing approach; sign-off process

Task.Name: 1.5 Data Segregation & Migration Strategy
Task.Notes: Data classification, migration approach JCI > MZ > Bosch

Task.Name: Data Classification & Ownership (JCI Aircon Business)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + JCI Data Owner + Bosch Data Owner | PII, IP, regulated data identified; data ownership matrix approved

Task.Name: Data Migration Approach: JCI to Merger Zone to Bosch
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + Infosys Data Migration Lead | Tooling selection; ETL methodology; data validation; SAP non-selective approach

Task.Name: 1.6 HR & People Transition Planning
Task.Notes: 12,000-user mapping; multi-jurisdiction employment; comms plan

Task.Name: Employee Mapping: JCI Aircon to Carve-out Entity (12,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI HR Director + Bosch HR Director | User list by site; role mapping; TUPE and transfer rules per jurisdiction

Task.Name: People Communication Plan (Multi-region, 48 Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI HR Director | Phased comms per wave; change management; union consultation plans

Task.Name: Phase 2: Merger Zone Build & Configuration (Infosys)
Task.Notes: MZ infrastructure build, IAM, core IT, SAP system copy, app wave 1

Task.Name: 2.1 Infrastructure Build - Merger Zone (Infosys)
Task.Notes: DC/cloud, network, security, backup/DR

Task.Name: Merger Zone DC / Cloud Environment Setup (Infosys)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Primary and secondary MZ hosting environments provisioned and validated

Task.Name: Network Connectivity: All 48 Sites to Merger Zone (Infosys)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Network Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | Site-by-site WAN/SD-WAN activation; phased rollout; all 48 sites connected to MZ

Task.Name: Security Architecture & Firewall Implementation (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Security Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | MZ perimeter security; DLP; endpoint protection; SOC integration; IDS/IPS

Task.Name: Backup, Disaster Recovery & Business Continuity Setup
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | DR test plan; RPO/RTO targets defined and validated; backup cadence confirmed

Task.Name: 2.2 Identity & Access Management (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: AD forest, identity federation, PAM, MFA

Task.Name: Active Directory Forest Setup (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys IAM Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | MZ AD forest live; OU structure; delegation model; trust relationships

Task.Name: Identity Federation: JCI to Merger Zone (SSO)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys IAM Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Federation live; ADFS/Azure AD Connect; JCI users authenticate to MZ services

Task.Name: Privileged Access Management (PAM) Setup
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Security Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | PAM tooling deployed; all admin accounts vaulted; session recording active

Task.Name: MFA & Security Policy Enforcement (12,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Security Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | MFA enrolled for all 12,000 users; conditional access; security baselines enforced

Task.Name: 2.3 Core IT Services Build (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Email/M365, SharePoint, Teams, ITSM service desk

Task.Name: Email & M365 Tenant Setup (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Cloud Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | MZ M365 tenant provisioned; mail flow validated; DNS prepared for cutover

Task.Name: SharePoint & OneDrive Migration Tooling Setup
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Cloud Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Migration tooling configured and tested; user data migration pipeline validated

Task.Name: Collaboration Tools: Teams & VOIP (Merger Zone)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Cloud Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Teams provisioned; VOIP platform migrated; telephony operational for MZ users

Task.Name: Service Desk & ITSM Tool Configuration (Infosys)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + KPMG Project Manager | ITSM platform live; service catalogue; SLA monitoring; L1/L2 support model

Task.Name: 2.4 SAP Build & Configuration (Infosys SAP Team)
Task.Notes: SAP system copy, client sep, interface rewiring, security, data prep

Task.Name: SAP System Copy: JCI to Merger Zone
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner | Full SAP landscape replication into MZ environment; technical validation complete

Task.Name: SAP Client Separation & Carve-out Configuration
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner | Aircon business data separated; shared client access revoked; configuration validated

Task.Name: SAP Interface Rewiring: JCI to Merger Zone Endpoints
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect | All outbound/inbound SAP interfaces rewired to MZ endpoints; EDI remapped

Task.Name: SAP Security Role Redesign & Authorization Model
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect | Role matrix redesigned; SoD rules applied; SAP GRC configured for MZ

Task.Name: SAP Data Migration Preparation (Technical Setup)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Data Migration Lead + KPMG Data Architect | Migration tooling; data mapping; extraction rules; transformation logic; test datasets

Task.Name: 2.5 Non-SAP Application Migration - Wave 1 (~400 Critical Apps)
Task.Notes: Prioritization, setup in MZ, data migration, smoke testing

Task.Name: Wave 1 Application Prioritization & Scope Finalization
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Data Architect + Infosys Application Lead | Wave 1 app list frozen; business criticality confirmed; migration sequence defined

Task.Name: Wave 1 Application Setup in Merger Zone
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | All Wave 1 apps installed and configured in MZ; integration points validated

Task.Name: Wave 1 Data Migration Execution
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Data Migration Lead + KPMG Data Architect | Data extracted from JCI; transformed; loaded into MZ; integrity checks passed

Task.Name: Wave 1 Application Smoke Testing & Validation
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | Functional smoke tests passed; business owners sign-off Wave 1 app readiness

Task.Name: QG2&3 - Build Complete & Test Ready
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | MZ infrastructure live; SAP interfaces rewired; Wave 1 apps validated; proceed to testing

Task.Name: Phase 3: Testing & Migration Waves
Task.Notes: SIT, UAT, 12k user migrations, app waves 2-3, SAP cutover rehearsal

Task.Name: 3.1 Systems Integration Testing
Task.Notes: E2E, performance, security pen test, DR test

Task.Name: End-to-End Integration Test: SAP & Non-SAP (Wave 1)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Full E2E flows across SAP, Wave 1 apps, MZ services; defects logged and resolved

Task.Name: Performance & Load Testing (12,000 Concurrent Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Peak load simulation; 12,000 concurrent users; MZ performance baselines met

Task.Name: Security Penetration Testing (Merger Zone & Applications)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Security Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | External and internal pen test; critical findings remediated; security report signed

Task.Name: Disaster Recovery Failover Test
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | Full DR failover executed; RTO/RPO targets validated; runbook confirmed

Task.Name: 3.2 User Acceptance Testing (UAT)
Task.Notes: UAT planning, execution, defect resolution, sign-off

Task.Name: UAT Planning & Test Case Design (All Workstreams)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI IT Manager + Bosch IT Manager | Test scenarios per workstream; 48-site scope covered; business testers briefed

Task.Name: UAT Execution: All User Groups (12,000 Users, Phased)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + Infosys Service Delivery Lead + JCI IT Manager | Phased UAT across all 48 sites; SAP transactions; Wave 1 apps; collaboration tools

Task.Name: UAT Defect Triage & Resolution
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG Project Manager | All critical and high defects resolved; regression tested; defect log shows zero blocking

Task.Name: UAT Sign-off by Business & IT Owners (All Sites)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI IT Manager + Bosch IT Manager | Formal UAT sign-off received; go-forward confirmation from all 48 sites

Task.Name: 3.3 User Migration Waves (12,000 Users - 48 Sites)
Task.Notes: Four waves covering all 12,000 users across 48 sites - completed pre-QG4

Task.Name: User Migration Wave 1: Sites 1-12 (3,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | Wave 1 users migrated to MZ; devices enrolled; M365 mailboxes cut; service desk live

Task.Name: User Migration Wave 2: Sites 13-24 (3,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | Wave 2 sites migrated; L1/L2 support cover maintained throughout window

Task.Name: User Migration Wave 3: Sites 25-36 (3,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | Wave 3 complete; all APAC and EMEA tail sites on MZ services

Task.Name: User Migration Wave 4: Sites 37-48 (3,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + JCI IT Manager | All 12,000 users migrated to Merger Zone; JCI user access fully transitioned

Task.Name: 3.4 Non-SAP Application Migration - Wave 2 (~800 Standard Apps)
Task.Notes: Wave 2 app migration and data migration - completed pre-QG4

Task.Name: Wave 2 Application Migration & Integration Testing
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + KPMG Data Architect | Wave 2 apps migrated to MZ; integration tests passed; business sign-off

Task.Name: Wave 2 Data Migration Execution
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Data Migration Lead + KPMG Data Architect | Wave 2 data extracted, transformed, loaded; integrity validated; reconciliation done

Task.Name: 3.5 Non-SAP Application Migration - Wave 3 (~600 Specialist Apps)
Task.Notes: Wave 3 app and data migration - completed pre-QG4

Task.Name: Wave 3 Application Migration & Integration Testing
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + KPMG Data Architect | Wave 3 specialist/regional apps migrated; integration validated; defects resolved

Task.Name: Wave 3 Data Migration Execution
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Data Migration Lead + KPMG Data Architect | Wave 3 data migration complete; all 1,800+ app data in MZ; no outstanding items

Task.Name: 3.6 SAP Production Cutover Planning & Rehearsal
Task.Notes: SAP cutover run book, two mock cutovers - completed pre-QG4

Task.Name: SAP GoLive Cutover Strategy & Run Book
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner | Detailed run book; cutover sequence; rollback plan; timing and resources confirmed

Task.Name: SAP Mock Cutover Exercise 1 (Full Dry Run)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner | Full dry run; timing measured; issues logged; rollback tested successfully

Task.Name: SAP Mock Cutover Exercise 2 (Final Rehearsal)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner | Issues from Mock 1 corrected; cutover timing confirmed; go/no-go criteria met

Task.Name: Phase 4: Pre-GoLive Readiness
Task.Notes: QG4 preparation, final readiness checks, GoLive cutover

Task.Name: 4.1 QG4 Gate Preparation
Task.Notes: All migration verification, infrastructure and SAP readiness, rollback plan

Task.Name: All Migration Waves Completed & Verified (Users + Apps + Data)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager | 12,000 users migrated; all 1,800+ apps on MZ; all data reconciled; UAT signed off

Task.Name: Infrastructure Readiness Sign-off (Infosys + KPMG)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | MZ infrastructure fully operational; DR validated; security cleared; monitoring active

Task.Name: SAP Production Readiness Confirmed
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG SAP Architect + JCI SAP Owner | SAP production environment validated; interfaces live; authorization model approved

Task.Name: Cutover Rollback Plan Approved
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager | Rollback plan reviewed and approved by steering; go/no-go criteria documented

Task.Name: QG4 - Pre-GoLive Gate Approval
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | All workstreams ready; QG4 approved; proceed to Final Readiness & GoLive preparation

Task.Name: 4.2 Final Readiness & Open Item Closure
Task.Notes: Mandatory: UAT defects, infra checks, rollback test, steering sign-off

Task.Name: All UAT Defects Resolved - QA Sign-off
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + Infosys Service Delivery Lead | Zero blocking defects; QA formally signs off UAT closure; test evidence archived

Task.Name: Final Infrastructure & Systems Health Checks (No Critical Alerts)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Infrastructure Architect + KPMG Infrastructure Architect | All MZ components green; no open P1 tickets; capacity validated for GoLive load

Task.Name: Cutover Rollback Test Executed (Production-like)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys SAP Architect + KPMG Project Manager | Full rollback test completed; rollback timing confirmed within window; approved

Task.Name: Business & Steering Committee Sign-off (GoLive Authorisation)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | Formal steering approval to proceed to GoLive; all action items closed; date confirmed

Task.Name: GoLive - Merger Zone Day 1 Cutover (2028-01-01)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | All 12,000 users live on Merger Zone; SAP production activated; 1,800+ apps operational; 24/7 support active

Task.Name: Phase 5: Hypercare & Project Closure
Task.Notes: 90-day hypercare, Bosch integration handover, TSA exit, PMO closure

Task.Name: 5.1 Hypercare Support (90 Days - Stabilisation Only)
Task.Notes: 24/7 L3 support, hotfixes, user enablement, Bosch knowledge transfer

Task.Name: 24/7 L3 Support & Incident Triage (Infosys)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Service Delivery Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Round-the-clock L3 support; P1/P2 hotline; daily ops standups all regions

Task.Name: Hotfix Release Management (Critical Bug Fixes Only)
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Application Lead + Infosys SAP Architect | Bug fixes only; no new features; change freeze enforced; release cadence weekly

Task.Name: User Enablement & Adoption Programs (12,000 Users)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + Infosys Service Delivery Lead + JCI IT Manager | Self-service guides; regional training; adoption dashboards; help desk KPIs tracked

Task.Name: Knowledge Transfer to Bosch IT Operations
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Infrastructure Architect + Infosys Infrastructure Architect + Bosch IT Manager | Run books; architecture docs; SAP operational guides; ITSM transition to Bosch team

Task.Name: 5.2 Bosch Integration Handover & Project Closure
Task.Notes: TSA exit, Bosch IT handover, documentation, lessons learned

Task.Name: JCI TSA Service Exit Execution
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG Project Manager + JCI IT Manager + Bosch IT Manager | JCI services formally exited per TSA exit criteria; acceptance tests passed; contracts closed

Task.Name: Bosch IT Systems Integration Handover
Task.Notes: Resources: Infosys Programme Manager + KPMG Infrastructure Architect + Bosch IT Manager | MZ services formally handed to Bosch IT operations; Infosys role concluded; ITSM transferred

Task.Name: Documentation & Runbook Finalization (All Workstreams)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + Infosys Programme Manager | Architecture docs; SAP guides; operational runbooks; security playbooks; all archived

Task.Name: Lessons Learned & PMO Closure Report (KPMG)
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + KPMG Project Manager | Lessons learned workshop; final PMO report; project artifacts archived; team debrief

Task.Name: QG5 - Project Completion
Task.Notes: Resources: KPMG PMO Lead + JCI Programme Sponsor + Bosch Programme Sponsor | 90-day hypercare complete; JCI TSA fully exited; Bosch IT operations live; programme closed
